name: Prescience
description: Healthcare for the age of abundant intelligence.

extra.name: Prescience
extra.long_description:
Prescience is the preeminent health benefits platform for the world's most ambitious companies. We save employers 20-50% on healthcare while offering best-in-industry health benefits: www.getprescience.com

About us:
Prescience is building a new healthcare system for America. We train AI systems to: create, operate, insure, and deliver healthcare for employer health plans. Prescience Time Machine – an AlphaGo-like system – steers patients towards “Move 37 health trajectories” that deliver dramatic cost savings for employers. Rishab Jain and Aditya Jain, M.D. are serial entrepreneurs and brothers from Harvard with backgrounds in machine learning and medicine. We believe abundant intelligence will bring an opportunity to fundamentally rebuild the $4.5T healthcare industry around proactive (prescient) health and wellness.
extra.one_liner: Healthcare for the age of abundant intelligence.

name: Archal
description: The eval platform for autonomous software

extra.name: Archal
extra.long_description: Archal lets you test agents and code that touch third-party APIs without hitting the real services. We build working clones of popular SaaS platforms that hold state across requests and behave like the originals, so you catch bugs before your agent does something irreversible in production.
extra.one_liner: The eval platform for autonomous software

name: Tsenta
description: We match you with jobs and apply automatically

extra.name: Tsenta
extra.long_description:
Tsenta matches you with jobs, optimizes your profile & applies on your behalf. We have:
➙ a web app ➙ an imessage bot ➙ an MCP ➙ a chrome extension, giving you control over every application being submitted.

We built Tsenta after applying to over 3,000 jobs manually, so that nobody else would have to.

Check us out at https://tsenta.com :)
extra.one_liner: We match you with jobs and apply automatically

name: Osmaura
description: We find new matter opportunities for law firms.

extra.name: Osmaura
extra.long_description:
Osmaura is building the AI growth engine for law firms. We help partners find and win new matters by monitoring the web, news, socials, and internal firm CRM to surface highly targeted opportunities for each partner.

After speaking with 100+ partners, we saw that every partner is under pressure to originate new work, but most do not get the level of dedicated support that "rainmakers" receive. That is because the work is still largely manual and expensive: tracking latent legal needs signals and figuring out how to engage the potential client.

AI makes it possible to give every partner rainmaker-level support.

We are starting with top-of-funnel business development, but we are expanding to support partners in all parts of winning and retaining clients:  scoping and pricing new matters, drafting marketing materials, and completing awards submissions.

We are already in the process of collaborating with a leading law firm to build this out for them.
extra.one_liner: We find new matter opportunities for law firms.

name: Pango
description: Agentic OS for e-commerce operations

extra.name: Pango
extra.long_description: Autonomous digital employee that runs back-office operations for e-commerce companies: deliveries, tracking, returns, transport and CS.
extra.one_liner: Agentic OS for e-commerce operations

name: Rex
description: AI Operations Partner for Enterprise Order to Cash

extra.name: Rex
extra.long_description:
Rex is an AI-native service for order to cash. We replace people-heavy operations with AI agents that continuously manage invoices, customers and exceptions.

Order to cash is a $60B outsourced function because the work is too messy for traditional automation. Every customer has different context, exceptions do not follow clean rules, and the next step is often buried in emails, portals, handoffs, or someone’s memory. Rex agents run continuously in the background and resolve work to SLA standards so cash keeps moving. We're live with pre-IPO tech companies, managing  >$500m in receivables from F100 companies, cutting manual follow-up cycles from weeks to hours.

We founded Rex after spending four years building Sequence, an a16z-backed finance ops platform, from zero to Series A — where we saw firsthand that at-scale, O2C still runs on manual labour.

Rex is the #1 winner of the Vercel AI Accelerator out of 2,500 teams, selected by Guillermo Rauch and leaders from OpenAI, Anthropic, Browserbase and more.
extra.one_liner: AI Operations Partner for Enterprise Order to Cash

name: GUILD
description: Neoprime Reshaping Defense Supply Chain

extra.name: GUILD
extra.long_description:
GUILD is a Neoprime contractor automating defense supply chain end-to-end by vertically integrating with our supplier partners.

We integrate artificial intelligence, contracting operations, and capital to source, fund, produce, and deliver defense contracts end-to-end.

Operating across the U.S. and NATO markets, we bridge global manufacturing capacity with defense demand and execute with the speed and precision of an AI-driven system.

Our mission is to build a modern, new generation defense contracting institution where technology and production operate as one.
extra.one_liner: Neoprime Reshaping Defense Supply Chain

name: RealPact
description: AI-native OS for Real Estate Brokerages

extra.name: RealPact
extra.long_description:
RealPact builds AI agents that handle the paperwork behind real estate transactions. They find property records like deeds, tax records, permits, parcel data, and MLS information, then use that data to fill out contracts, organize documents, track deadlines, and help brokerages close deals faster.

We currently sell to brokerages in New Hampshire and are expanding quickly.
extra.one_liner: AI-native OS for Real Estate Brokerages
extra.subindustry: Real Estate and Construction -> Housing and Real Estate

name: Truffle
description: The autonomous back-of-house for restaurants.

extra.name: Truffle
extra.long_description: Truffle is the first AI-native operating system for the hospitality back-of-house. Restaurants, cafes and bars still run on a patchwork of disconnected point solutions, spreadsheets, clipboards and tribal knowledge, which costs the industry billions each year in stockouts, food waste, and lost profit. Truffle replaces that entire stack with one system. Computer vision and voice AI capture real-time inventory 90% faster than manual counts, ML models forecast item-level demand at 97% accuracy, and AI agents run dozens of end-to-end workflows autonomously, from procurement and invoice reconciliation to scheduling, food prep, menu engineering, and more.
extra.one_liner: The autonomous back-of-house for restaurants.

name: Glen
description: Shared learning for AI Agents

extra.name: Glen
extra.long_description: What your best people know, every agent in your org can use. Glen picks it up as the work happens, nothing to write down, nothing to maintain, and it never walks out the door. A day-one hire's agent runs on the same judgment as your most senior person's.
extra.one_liner: Shared learning for AI Agents

name: Context.dev
description: We give AI agents realtime web context.

extra.name: Context.dev
extra.long_description:
Context.dev provides AI agents and software products with realtime web context at scale through a single API layer. 

We help developers build smarter agents & products that depend on accurate, fresh web data.

If you need structured data from the internet, you need Context.dev

Proud to power agentic products at Mintlify, Super, Vizzy, Klarna, and 250 other companies.
extra.one_liner: We give AI agents realtime web context.

name: Cerenovus
description: Aggregate company knowledge and make inferences

extra.name: Cerenovus
extra.long_description:
Cerenovus is a company brain. We aggregate every kind of file a company produces — documents, PDFs, emails, Slack messages, spreadsheets, meeting notes — and convert them into a single markdown knowledge graph with native AI-agent integration. A company's information becomes uniformly readable both by humans and by the AI agents working inside the graph.

On top of that foundation, Cerenovus maps the company as a system, drawing connections between the people, processes, and tools that make up real workflows. From that systems map, it infers where operations are inefficient and how to improve them.

In practice, this tool will help executives make better decisions. Whenever a leader has to act on a question — how to restructure a team, whether to keep a vendor, or where handoffs between teams are breaking down — Cerenovus will give them an evidence-backed answer in minutes rather than weeks.

Today, that work is done by consultants, by internal analysts, or by the executive asking around informally. Each of those approaches is slow, partial, and goes stale the moment it is delivered. Cerenovus produces the same answers faster, at a fraction of the cost, and keeps them live as the company evolves.
extra.one_liner: Aggregate company knowledge and make inferences

name: machine0
description: Persistent & powerful cloud VMs from your CLI

extra.name: machine0
extra.long_description:
machine0 is a CLI that lets you create, provision, and snapshot cloud VMs. `machine0 new my-vm` spins up a VM with dedicated CPU, RAM, and optional GPUs, plus a static IP and HTTPS endpoint. The tools agents need (e.g. Node, Python, Docker) and the agents themselves (e.g. Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, Hermes) come pre-installed. 99.99% VM uptime SLA across four regions.

Agent workloads are moving from ephemeral to always-on. A coding agent debugging a complex issue runs 4-8 hours. OpenClaw runs 24/7. machine0 is the environment in which these agents run.
extra.one_liner: Persistent & powerful cloud VMs from your CLI

name: Levocred AI
description: AI for every workflow inside a credit team

extra.name: Levocred AI
extra.long_description: Levocred AI is the Company Brain for credit teams — an AI employee that plugs into the fund's loan tape, credit agreements, servicer reports, and bank feeds, and runs the workflows analysts would otherwise grind on.
extra.one_liner: AI for every workflow inside a credit team

name: Mireye
description: Infrastructure for Physical World AI Agents

extra.name: Mireye
extra.long_description:
AI agents are starting to act in the real world, but they can't reliably understand it. 

Geospatial data is complex, fragmented, and unstructured. Ask a model a specific question about a specific place and it guesses. Our API and MCP give agents cited answers about any location.

Our mission is to index every inch of the earth, and make it as queryable as the web.
extra.one_liner: Infrastructure for Physical World AI Agents

name: Hop Aero
description: Rocket cargo delivery to contested environments

extra.name: Hop Aero
extra.long_description: Hop Aero is building rocket cargo vehicles that deliver to contested environments hundreds of miles away in minutes. Our rockets fly point-to-point into the most austere locations at hypersonic speeds. Hop Aero's goal is to provide the U.S. and allies the asymmetric advantage that deters a future major conflict.
extra.one_liner: Rocket cargo delivery to contested environments
